headings.text: Leon Announces the New Solé TV Frame for Sony’s BRAVIA 7
Leon Announces the New Solé TV Frame for Sony’s BRAVIA 7

If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingLeon Announces the New Solé TV Frame for Sony’s BRAVIA 7Posted on December 17, 2025Leon Announces the New Solé TV Frame for Sony’s BRAVIA 7By RS StaffPublished: December 9, 2025Leon has launched the Solé TV Frame for Sony BRAVIA 7. Available in 65-, 75-, and 85-inch sizes, this aluminum frame transforms BRAVIA 7’s Ultra-4K display into a framed work of living art — without compromising on picture quality.‍‍‍Available in three curated finishes — light wood grain, dark wood grain, and linear black — Solé’s seamless aesthetic and contemporary profile complement any space, while its precision-fit magnetic design makes installation effortless. Simply click the corners together and attach to the TV bezel, and your display is perfectly framed.BRAVIA 7’s depth and detail pair with Solé’s expert craftsmanship for a true, gallery-quality experience at every level — from precise brushstrokes to cinematic close-ups.At launch, the Solé Frame includes a complimentary six-month subscription to Niio, a digital art platform built for everyday enjoyment and creative expression. With access to over 30,000 museum-quality artworks from 7500+ global artists and galleries, Niio transforms any screen into a moving image art canvas. Browse curated collections, create and share playlists, or upload your own photos and videos to turn your BRAVIA 7 into a personal gallery.Starting at $299 MSRP, the Solé Frame offers an approachable entry point for design-conscious consumers seeking a new way to elevate their viewing experience.‍‍‍‍If you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‍‍‍Services:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‍Proudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‍‍‍‍‍‍‍Engage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright © 2023.
